frame_analyses.description: Title card showing 'CM-15 colon phantom Basic Training' with animated 3D model of colonoscope and phantom
Instructor in clinical setting with endoscopy equipment, holding Olympus colonoscope next to CM-15 phantom on table
Close-up of phantom showing anatomical detail - pink/red colonic tissue with haustral markings and vessel patterns
Instructor demonstrating scope insertion angle and positioning, monitor shows endoscopic view of colon
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper insertion technique being demonstrated with visual feedback from scope camera

frame_analyses.description: Endoscopic view on monitor shows colonic mucosa with normal vasculature and haustral pattern
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Navigation through phantom colon demonstrated in real-time endoscopic view

frame_analyses.description: Instructor's hand position on scope controls, demonstrating proper technique for navigation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Grip and control technique shown for colonoscope handling

frame_analyses.description: Demonstrating navigation through more distal colon, endoscopic view shows progression deeper into phantom
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Advanced scope manipulation technique for navigating tortuous/narrowed segments

frame_analyses.description: Final demonstration showing colonoscope fully inserted with good visualization of distal colon segments
Olympus corporate branding and tagline 'Your Vision, Our Innovation' displayed

score_components.formula_applied: N/A - instructional content, not a performance task

confidence_rationale: Video classification is definitive: this is an instructional/training demonstration for colonoscopy technique using a CM-15 phantom model, not an FLS task performance. The presence of narrated instruction, educational framing, equipment overview, and manufacturer branding clearly identifies this as instructional content rather than a trainee performance of an FLS task.
cannot_determine: FLS task applicability - video content is not related to any of the 5 official FLS/MISTELS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, Intracorporeal Suture)
technique_summary: This is NOT an FLS task video. It is an educational training video for colonoscopy technique using an Olympus CM-15 colon phantom. No FLS scoring rubric applies. The video demonstrates proper colonoscope insertion, navigation, and visualization techniques in a clinical training setting.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper colonoscope grip and hand positioning
Correct insertion angle and insertion technique
Navigation through colon phantom using scope deflection controls
Progressive distal navigation through haustral segments
common_errors_addressed: Improper scope angle during insertion (avoided in demo)
Poor visualization from excessive scope advancement without proper tip control (avoided)

recommendation: This video cannot be scored using FLS rubrics. It is a product training/instructional video for colonoscopy technique on an Olympus phantom model. To obtain an FLS score, submit a video of an actual trainee performing one of the five official FLS tasks: Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture.
